name: cohere
description: Chat with Cohere Command models, create embeddings, and rerank documents via the Cohere API

envVars.name: COHERE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Cohere API key from the Cohere dashboard

tools.name: List Models
tools.description: List the Cohere models available to the API key

page_size.description: Maximum number of models per page (1-1000)

page_token.description: next_page_token from a previous list call

endpoint.description: Filter to models compatible with an endpoint: chat, embed, classify, or rerank

historicalSummary.omitted: tokenizer URLs, sampling defaults, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Create Chat
tools.description: Generate a chat response with a Cohere Command model (v2 Chat API)

model.description: Model ID to use, e.g. command-a-03-2025

messages.description: Chat messages, each with role (system|user|assistant) and content

tools.name: Create Embedding
tools.description: Create embedding vectors for input texts (v2 Embed API)

texts.description: Array of strings to embed (max 96 per call)

input_type.description: One of search_document, search_query, classification, clustering, or image

tools.name: Rerank Documents
tools.description: Rank a list of documents by relevance to a query (v2 Rerank API)

query.description: The search query to rank against

documents.description: Array of document texts to compare to the query

top_n.description: Limit results to the top N most relevant documents

prompts.title: List Cohere models
prompts.prompt: List the Cohere models available to my API key and note which endpoints each supports.

prompts.title: Rerank search results
prompts.prompt: Use Cohere Rerank to order a list of documents I provide by relevance to my query.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Cohere API Setup

steps.title: Create a Cohere account
steps.description: Go to https://dashboard.cohere.com and sign up or sign in. New accounts get a free trial key that works for evaluation without billing.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Open https://dashboard.cohere.com/api-keys. Use the trial key for testing, or click 'New Production Key' for production use (requires billing details).

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Copy the key and add it to your .env file as COHERE_API_KEY=...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Models tool to confirm the key works. A 401 means the key is wrong or revoked.

notes: Trial keys are free but heavily rate limited — switch to a production key for real workloads
Chat, Embed, and Rerank calls are billed per token/search unit on production keys
